title: Coca-Cola pension fund ILS investment grew to $266m on returns in 2025
description: Coca-Cola's pension fund ILS portfolio expanded to $266m in 2025, reflecting strong returns in insurance-linked securities. Demonstrates institutional appetite for alternative risk transfer mechanisms and cat bond performance.

title: Hawaii’s Worst Flooding in 20 Years Prompts Evacuations
description: Hawaii experiences worst flooding in two decades following saturated soil conditions and sequential heavy rainfall events. Significant claims exposure for property, casualty, and business interruption coverage across the state.

title: Relation Insurance Acquires Chinook Insurance Group in Washington
description: Relation Insurance acquires Chinook Insurance Group's subsea and aquaculture operations in Seattle. Consolidation strengthens specialist marine and offshore energy risk underwriting capacity in North American market.

title: Nebraska Fires Burn Grazing Lands, Threaten Plans to Grow US Cattle Herd
description: Severe Nebraska wildfires destroy extensive grazing lands threatening US cattle production expansion. Agricultural and livestock underwriters face elevated exposure; commodity price inflation impacts farm property and business interruption claims.

title: Florida Man Faked Brain Injury for Years in Attempt to Gain $6M in Insurance
description: Multi-year auto insurance fraud scheme involving fabricated brain injury claims seeking $6m damages. Highlights organized fraud rings and claims investigation vulnerabilities in personal lines coverage.

title: P/C Industry Loss Reserves Redundant by More Than $20B: Assured Research
description: US P&C industry year-end 2025 loss reserves redundant by $20bn-plus, indicating conservative reserving and favorable prior-year loss development. Positive signals for underwriting profitability and reserve adequacy.

title: Chubb appoints new heads of Property and Casualty in Overseas General division
description: Chubb announces senior leadership appointments in Overseas General division commercial property and casualty operations. Organizational restructuring reflects strategic emphasis on specialty lines growth.

title: Starr completes IQUW deal, strengthens specialty re/insurance presence
description: Starr completes IQUW acquisition, consolidating specialty reinsurance and insurance platform across London, Bermuda and UK retail motor markets. Significant market consolidation enhancing specialty underwriting capabilities.

title: USAA adding to stated reinsurance for some ResRe cat bonds after SCS model update

title: Trump Suit Against Capital One Dismissed But Can Be Refiled
description: Trump Organization's lawsuit against Capital One dismissed for procedural deficiencies but permitted refiling; addresses account closure dispute with potential reputational implications.

description: Corpus Christi water crisis escalates as residents enforce usage restrictions; emerging drought-related property and business interruption risk exposure in Texas.

description: British expat lifestyle in Dubai facing economic headwinds. Regional economic volatility and potential expatriate repatriation trends affecting property, life, and specialty insurance demand in UAE.

description: Analysis of insurability frameworks for prediction markets and novelty wagering platforms. Emerging non-traditional risk classes and coverage uncertainties in speculative markets requiring underwriting reassessment.

description: Orlando apartment complex evacuation following structural cracks across all five floors. Significant property damage and potential casualty exposure from structural defects affecting multi-unit residential portfolios.

title: Negligence Suit Filed Over Death of Former New York Yankee’s Teenage Son at Resort
description: Negligence lawsuit filed over carbon dioxide-related death at Costa Rica resort. Premises liability and hospitality sector claims highlighting inadequate safety protocols and potential policy coverage disputes.

title: Ohio Bill Would Establish Online Auto Insurance Verification
description: Ohio legislature proposes online auto insurance verification system to enforce compliance and reduce uninsured driver exposure. House Bill 678 aims to improve underwriting controls and claims cost mitigation through mandatory digital verification protocols.
